headline: Caesars Entertainment (CZR) Up 28.1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Caesars Entertainment (CZR) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Is Expedia Group Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Though Expedia Group has lagged behind the broader Nasdaq Composite on a YTD basis, Wall Street analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Consumer Internet Stocks Q4 Teardown: Expedia (NASDAQ:EXPE) Vs The Rest
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how consumer internet stocks fared in Q4, starting with Expedia (NASDAQ:EXPE).
